contact.pageDescription: Have any questions or want to learn about our services? Please fill out the form below, and we will contact you as soon as possible.
contact.form.name: Name *
contact.form.messagePlaceholder: Please describe your needs or questions in detail
contact.faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
contact.faq.q1: What is the difference between multilingual content production and traditional localization?
contact.faq.a1: Multilingual content production is multilingual creation that starts from the content planning stage, while traditional localization is translation after the source language content is created. Our solution is more efficient and better meets the needs of different markets.
contact.faq.a2: We support major global languages, including Chinese, English, Japanese, Korean, Spanish, French, German, etc. The specific list of supported languages can be discussed in detail during consultation.
contact.faq.q3: How long does a project usually take?
contact.faq.a3: The project cycle depends on the amount and complexity of content. Generally, small projects may take 2-4 weeks, and large projects may take 1-3 months. We will provide an accurate time estimate during the initial consultation.
contact.faq.q4: How do you ensure content quality?
contact.faq.a4: We adopt an AI generation + expert review model. Each version will go through multiple rounds of review by language experts, cultural consultants, and content strategists to ensure quality meets international standards.
contact.toast.success: Thank you for your consultation! We will contact you as soon as possible.
contact.toast.error: Submission failed, please try again later
testimonials.title: Customer Testimonials
testimonials.subtitle: Real feedback from global enterprises, witnessing how 1StepMore helps brands go global
testimonials.item1.text: 1StepMore has completely transformed how we enter new markets. They not only provide high-quality localized content but also ensure cultural relevance, which is crucial for our brand image. Now, we can confidently launch products in multiple countries.
testimonials.item1.metric: 35% increase in user engagement in new markets
testimonials.item2.text: We previously faced bottlenecks in content publishing across different languages, with low efficiency and high costs. Since partnering with 1StepMore, our content production process has become incredibly smooth, and the quality remains consistent. They are experts in multilingual content.
testimonials.item3.text: As a digital marketing agency, we need to provide fast and high-quality multilingual content for our clients. 1StepMore's platform and team perfectly meet our needs. Their professionalism and responsiveness have helped us stand out from the competition and deliver significant ROI for our clients.
testimonials.item3.metric: 25% increase in client international market conversion rate
services.item1.description1: A more AI-native solution than localization — clients provide direction, and we directly produce multilingual content.
services.item1.description2: Traditional localization is 'content first, then translation'. We take one step further: clients only need to tell us 'what content they want', and we use large models and human experts to directly produce multilingual versions. This is a more native multilingual content solution for the AI era.

pricing.header.title: Transparent Pricing
pricing.header.description: Reject price black boxes, from the ultimate cost-effective "AI + light proofreading" solution to the "expert-level" high-end delivery solution. Make your budget count.
pricing.header.highlight: 💡 30%-50% efficiency improvement from AI directly translates to price advantages
pricing.subscriptionPlans.title: Subscription: Lightweight Monthly Package
pricing.subscriptionPlans.description: A "value experience package" designed for frequent, scattered needs. Enjoy more favorable prices than one-time purchases through prepayment.
pricing.plans.personal.name: Personal/SME Monthly Card
pricing.plans.personal.description: Basic services for individual creators and small businesses
pricing.plans.enterprise.name: Enterprise Annual Card
pricing.notes.label: Note:
pricing.notes.subscription: Word count in the subscription package does not carry over to the next month; excess usage will be settled according to the "pay-as-you-go" standard below, with a 5% member discount.
pricing.serviceLevels.title: Pay-as-you-go: Text and Document Localization
pricing.serviceLevels.description: Unit price × per 1,000 words × language coefficient (no hidden word lookup fees, no full charge for repeated words)
pricing.serviceLevel.l1.name: L1 - Basic Level
pricing.serviceLevel.l1.description: Suitable for internal reference, drafts and other non-core content
pricing.serviceLevel.l1.standard: AI initial translation + basic proofreading, ensuring basic fluency
pricing.serviceLevel.l1.competitive: Significant price advantage, suitable for high-frequency, low-risk content
pricing.serviceLevel.l2.name: L2 - Standard Level
pricing.serviceLevel.l2.description: Suitable for general marketing and product content
pricing.serviceLevel.l2.standard: AI initial translation + professional proofreading, ensuring reliable quality
pricing.serviceLevel.l2.competitive: High cost performance, balancing quality and cost
pricing.serviceLevel.l3.name: L3 - Expert Level
pricing.serviceLevel.l3.description: Suitable for core contracts, technical documents and other high-quality requirements
pricing.serviceLevel.l3.standard: AI assistance + expert deep proofreading, ensuring professional accuracy
pricing.serviceLevel.l3.competitive: Quality benchmark, suitable for high-value content
pricing.serviceLevel.scenarios.title: Applicable Scenarios
pricing.serviceLevel.standard.title: Delivery Standards & Competitiveness
pricing.notes.floating.label: Floating Note:
pricing.notes.floating.description: For extremely high professionalism (such as patents, ancient books) or special format requirements, prices may fluctuate by 10%-20% based on the base price.

pricing.whyChooseUs.title: Why Choose 1StepMore?
pricing.whyChooseUs.reason1.title: Reject Excessive Profits
pricing.whyChooseUs.reason1.description: 30%-50% efficiency improvement from AI directly translates to price advantages. Our cost advantages are fully passed on to customers.
pricing.whyChooseUs.reason2.title: Flexible Options
pricing.whyChooseUs.reason2.description: Use the ¥60 plan for internal reference, and the ¥250 plan for core contracts. Make your budget count.
pricing.whyChooseUs.reason3.title: Expert Guarantee
pricing.whyChooseUs.reason3.description: High-risk projects mandatorily involve SME (Subject Matter Expert) proofreading, ensuring professional logic and zero error tolerance.
pricing.adjustments.title: Transparent Adjustment Coefficients
pricing.adjustments.language.title: Language Coefficient (Tier)
pricing.adjustments.language.description: Leveraging Shenyang's geographical advantages to optimize costs for Japanese, Korean and European languages.
pricing.adjustments.language.tier2: Chinese ↔ Japanese, Korean, German, French, Russian, Spanish
pricing.adjustments.language.tier3: Chinese ↔ Thai, Vietnamese, Arabic, Portuguese and other minor languages
pricing.adjustments.difficulty.title: Difficulty and Rush
pricing.adjustments.difficulty.format.fe: +10% ~ 15% (only for non-editable images/scanned PDFs, 0% for editable documents)
pricing.cta.title: Ready to Get Started?
pricing.cta.description: Contact our team for a customized quote and consultation plan
terms.header.title: Terms and Conditions
terms.header.subtitle: 服务条款与免责声明
terms.section1.title: 1. Validity
terms.section1.item1: The prices and preferential terms listed in this quotation are valid for 30 days (calculated from the date the quotation is issued).
terms.section1.item2: If market exchange rates fluctuate by more than +/- 5%, or if project requirements (such as source file quality, delivery time, or word count scale) change significantly, 1StepMore reserves the right to adjust the quotation.
terms.section2.title: 2. Billing & Payment
terms.section2.wordCount.title: Word Count
terms.section2.wordCount.description: Unless otherwise agreed, translation fees are calculated based on the character count/word count of the Source Language, with counting standards based on the "word count" function of popular software such as Microsoft Word.
terms.section2.tax.title: Tax Notes
terms.section2.tax.description: Unless explicitly marked as "tax-inclusive price" in the quotation, all prices are excluding tax. If you need a value-added tax invoice, tax points will be calculated separately.
terms.section3.title: 3. Delivery & Revision
terms.section3.deliveryTime.title: Delivery Time
terms.section3.deliveryTime.description: The delivery period refers to working days (Monday to Friday, excluding public holidays). The project start time is calculated from the moment the advance payment or official PO (Purchase Order) is received.
terms.section3.warranty.title: Free Warranty
terms.section3.warranty.description: We are committed to the delivered content. If you have any objections to the translation quality, please raise them within 10 working days after receiving the files. During this period, we will provide unlimited free revision services for objectively existing omissions, errors, or issues that do not comply with the agreed terminology glossary.
terms.section3.preferences.title: Subjective Preferences
terms.section3.preferences.description: For revision requests that are based on personal aesthetic or style preferences (such as "not beautiful enough", "not powerful enough") rather than objective errors, we reserve the right to negotiate additional fees based on the workload.
terms.section4.title: 4. IPR & Confidentiality
terms.section4.confidentiality.title: Confidentiality Commitment
terms.section4.confidentiality.descripti: 1StepMore strictly abides by confidentiality obligations. Without the client's written permission, we will never disclose your original documents, translation results, or any trade secrets to third parties.
terms.section4.copyright.title: Copyright Ownership
terms.section4.copyright.description: After the client pays the full amount, the copyright and ownership of the translated work belong entirely to the client.
terms.section5.title: 5. Limitation of Liability
terms.section5.sourceResponsibility.desc: If translation deviations occur due to ambiguity, errors, or uneditability (such as low-resolution scanned documents) in the original document itself, we are not responsible for such issues.
terms.section5.liabilityCap.title: Liability Cap
terms.section5.liabilityCap.description: If direct economic losses are caused to the client due to delivery delays or quality issues caused by us, our maximum compensation amount shall not exceed the total service fee for that specific project. We are not responsible for any indirect, incidental, or punitive damages.
terms.section6.title: 6. Final Interpretation
terms.section6.item1: To the extent permitted by law, Shenyang Guanwei Technology Co., Ltd. reserves the final interpretation right for this quotation and related service terms.
terms.section6.item2: If there is any conflict between these terms and the formal contract signed by both parties, the terms of the formal contract shall prevail.
terms.importantNotes.title: Important Notes
terms.importantNotes.item1: We are committed to providing you with high-quality translation and localization services. If you have any questions or need further clarification, please feel free to contact us at any time.
terms.importantNotes.item2: These terms were last updated in March 2026. 1StepMore reserves the right to update these terms as needed for business development.
terms.importantNotes.item3: If you have any questions about these service terms, please contact us through the "Contact Us" page.
terms.cta.title: Have any questions?
terms.cta.description: Our team is ready to answer any questions you may have about our service terms and pricing.

cases.case1.title: Global E-Commerce Expansion
cases.case1.challenge: A leading e-commerce platform needed to expand into 5 new markets across Asia and Europe, requiring high-quality localized content for product descriptions, marketing materials, and customer support.
cases.case1.solution: Implemented a comprehensive multilingual content production strategy using AI-powered translation with human expertise, creating over 10,000 product descriptions and marketing assets across 8 languages.
cases.case1.result: Achieved 35% increase in conversion rates in new markets, with 40% faster content delivery compared to traditional localization methods.
cases.case2.title: SaaS Product Globalization
cases.case2.challenge: A B2B SaaS company needed to localize their entire product interface and documentation for Japanese and German markets within 3 months.
cases.case2.solution: Developed a structured localization workflow combining AI translation with technical reviewers, ensuring consistent terminology and cultural adaptation across all user touchpoints.
cases.case2.result: Successfully launched in both markets on schedule, with 98% user satisfaction ratings for the localized experience.
cases.case3.title: Gaming Industry Localization
cases.case3.challenge: A mobile game developer needed to localize their popular title for Korean and Chinese markets, requiring cultural adaptation and contextually relevant content.
cases.case3.solution: Created culturally adapted content that preserved game mechanics while resonating with local audiences, including localized humor, references, and visual elements.
cases.case3.result: Achieved 2.5x user acquisition in target markets and 60% longer average session times compared to non-localized versions.
